name: Masha, Mahiru, Alya and Senko-ready to take care of you! The Ultimate pampering gang!
description: Yeah, i just did a fluff, comfort bot just now... but after making my first bot that involved Mahiru, i couldn't resist making another one where she's companied with Masha! And who wouldn't be a better company for them than Senko?
creator: Totallynotamultiplecharacterbotmaker
